title.zh: 中医塑形：健康减肥与体态塑造
title.en: TCM Body Shaping: Healthy Weight Loss & Body Contouring

description.zh: 掌握中医塑形的方法，通过调理体质实现健康减肥，塑造优美体态
description.en: Master TCM body shaping methods, regulate constitution for healthy weight loss

zh.text: 中医塑形不同于现代减肥只关注体重数字，而是强调调理体质、平衡阴阳。通过辨证施治，找到肥胖的根本原因，实现健康减肥和体态塑造。
中医认为肥胖与以下因素有关：

items: 脾运化失常，水湿停滞
表现为虚胖、浮肿
调理：健脾祛湿
胃火旺盛，食欲亢进
表现为实胖、肌肉结实
调理：清胃泻火
情绪不畅，气机郁滞
表现为压力型肥胖
调理：疏肝解郁
肾阳虚弱，代谢缓慢
表现为虚寒型肥胖
调理：温补肾阳
薏米：健脾祛湿，利水消肿
茯苓：健脾利湿，宁心安神
白术：健脾燥湿，益气
泽泻：利水渗湿，泄热
赤小豆：利水消肿，解毒排脓
玫瑰花：疏肝理气，活血化瘀
柴胡：疏肝解郁，升举阳气
郁金：行气解郁，凉血破瘀
陈皮：理气健脾，燥湿化痰
肉桂：温补肾阳，散寒止痛
杜仲：补肝肾，强筋骨
淫羊藿：补肾阳，强筋骨
附子：温补肾阳，散寒除湿
足三里：健脾益气，促进代谢
三阴交：调补气血，利水消肿
丰隆穴：化痰祛湿，降脂塑形
天枢穴：调理肠胃，促进排便
关元穴：培补元气，温阳塑形

zh.title: 健脾祛湿塑形茶
zh.instructions:
1. 所有材料洗净
2. 加水煮沸
3. 转小火煮20分钟
4. 代茶饮用
5. 每日1次
6. 健脾祛湿，促进代谢

zh.title: 疏肝解郁塑形茶
zh.instructions:
1. 所有材料洗净
2. 加水煮沸
3. 转小火煮10分钟
4. 代茶饮用
5. 每日1次
6. 疏肝理气，促进代谢

items: 饮食清淡：少吃油腻、甜食
定时定量：规律进食
细嚼慢咽：促进消化
多喝水：促进代谢
多吃粗粮：增加膳食纤维
太极：调和气血，塑形养身
八段锦：疏通经络，强身健体
散步：促进代谢，温和塑形
瑜伽：拉伸塑形，放松身心
游泳：全身运动，塑形效果好
循序渐进：不可急于求成
持之以恒：长期坚持才有效
辨证施治：根据体质选择方法
避免极端：不节食、不暴食
关注健康：塑形同时保持健康

zh.text: 温馨提示：塑形需要长期坚持，不可急于求成。建议在中医师指导下根据体质进行个性化塑形方案，避免盲目减肥损害健康。

en.text: TCM body shaping differs from modern weight loss that focuses only on weight numbers. It emphasizes regulating constitution and balancing Yin-Yang. Through pattern differentiation, find the root cause of obesity for healthy weight loss and body contouring.

items: Spleen dysfunction, water-dampness stagnation
Signs: Soft obesity, puffiness
Treatment: Strengthen spleen, resolve dampness
Excess stomach fire, increased appetite
Signs: Solid obesity, firm muscles
Treatment: Clear stomach, drain fire
Emotional blockage, Qi stagnation
Signs: Stress-related obesity
Treatment: Soothe liver, resolve stagnation
Weak kidney Yang, slow metabolism
Signs: Cold-type obesity
Treatment: Warm and tonify kidney Yang
Coix seed: Strengthens spleen, resolves dampness, drains water
Poria: Strengthens spleen, drains dampness, calms spirit
Atractylodes: Strengthens spleen, dries dampness, tonifies Qi
Alisma: Drains water, resolves dampness, clears heat
Red adzuki bean: Drains water, reduces swelling
Rose: Soothes liver, regulates Qi, activates blood
Bupleurum: Soothes liver, resolves stagnation
Curcuma: Moves Qi, resolves stagnation
Dried tangerine peel: Regulates Qi, strengthens spleen
Cinnamon bark: Warms kidney Yang, disperses cold
Eucommia: Tonifies liver-kidney, strengthens bones
Epimedium: Tonifies kidney Yang, strengthens bones
Aconite: Warms kidney Yang, disperses cold-dampness
Zusanli: Strengthens spleen, tonifies Qi, promotes metabolism
Sanyinjiao: Regulates Qi-Blood, drains water, reduces swelling
Fenglong: Resolves phlegm-dampness, reduces fat
Tianshu: Regulates intestines, promotes bowel movement
Guanyuan: Tonifies original Qi, warms Yang

en.title: Spleen-Strengthening Dampness-Resolving Tea
en.instructions:
1. Wash all ingredients
2. Boil water
3. Simmer for 20 minutes
4. Drink as tea
5. Once daily
6. Strengthens spleen, resolves dampness, promotes metabolism

en.title: Liver-Soothing Stagnation-Resolving Tea
en.instructions:
1. Wash all ingredients
2. Boil water
3. Simmer for 10 minutes
4. Drink as tea
5. Once daily
6. Soothes liver, regulates Qi, promotes metabolism

items: Light diet: Reduce greasy, sweet foods
Regular timing: Eat at consistent times
Chew slowly: Promotes digestion
Drink more water: Promotes metabolism
Eat more whole grains: Increase fiber
Tai Chi: Harmonizes Qi-Blood, shapes body
Ba Duan Jin: Clears meridians, strengthens body
Walking: Promotes metabolism, gentle shaping
Yoga: Stretching, shaping, relaxation
Swimming: Full-body exercise, excellent shaping
Gradual progress: Don't rush
Persistence: Long-term commitment needed
Pattern differentiation: Choose methods by constitution
Avoid extremes: No fasting, no bingeing
Focus on health: Stay healthy while shaping

en.text: Note: Body shaping requires long-term commitment. Recommend personalized shaping plan under TCM practitioner guidance based on constitution. Avoid blind weight loss that damages health.
